textByHash.0d1cd9824a1b34d8d03b786adbf64fa9b91f1839: I hear you're hunting for . Aren't you looking for a at the moment? You'll need to bring back some of its .
textByHash.1adff6c74c60af6d4b216e5b0437fec4fc1f702a: Unless you fancy hunting for me instead?
textByHash.1dfec304917692fc7864b1252d0cee424089ddbe: Looks like we need some information on a unique specimen amongst the local population. Once you find it, bring back some of its .
textByHash.205eec4711372b4cbc8651bb82f25e26b8979b4a: Ah, that's the same thing that brought me here.
textByHash.33b16d60d0f65b54c8a253c6514a85e4e58b9b33: Well it's less boring than what I've done before, so I can't complain!
textByHash.3b12c69d000666f02c81746cd6629255c6b67798: We've got reports of a slightly different in the local population. Once you find it, bring back one of its .
textByHash.3ca6dc3b19cd81abf93d51d55b582ff7300435f9: We're all having a rest, but don't you have something to be getting on with?
textByHash.4a9509d43a025a0138b9d6d12bafcbb9edc46850: Could you check out the validity of this report for me? Someone thinks they've seen a . Once you find it, bring back one of its .
textByHash.58c48a7e057e715e372be1165766b47b5c9fdead: Well, my parents wanted me to go into the whole wine growing business, but farming was a bit too slow-paced for me.
textByHash.6c2de7e9597fc9dcf826c71e669f9746a4632d1a: Thanks for that. I'll mark off that report for you. Would you like another rumour?
textByHash.6e1f4ef9f53f9213fe3ab194d54dddc4b4bcbeae: Gilman said that you're doing some work for him right now. I won't interfere with that.
textByHash.81fc9cf16c5af2941312da6450274f9f5d53f5b5: Heard we're having an intel reshuffle. You should probably focus on your current task for now.
textByHash.8a3971e8aba3cd643e39df13b1ce083efe1f8950: Are you interested in taking on another one for me?
textByHash.8d44a1d45141841d715032aa808bce6a0444bb39: You're new here, aren't you? You might want to talk to Verity before you get started.
textByHash.8dd6375b3b32be72dd7a5c34d66b5ffd3642bbe9: I've heard rumours of a strange that you could check out for me. Once you find it, bring back one of its .
textByHash.91b108d99c1cfc7625f26d7e5e189a4e38f7c639: Ah, yes. I asked you to hunt a and bring back some of its . Hope it's not too boring for you!
textByHash.a14316a95e6fefbb1d6775836e1298d233bd86e5: There's been rumours of a rare coming in. Once you find it, bring back one of its .
textByHash.afc7958aa9e61a2ab721c11f2273f5edab113289: Only by interest at the moment, although the gang here are trying their best to train me.
textByHash.e8167a7cfe01c4556118fc237478f28c94f38e29: What's brought you in here today?
textByHash.ee80a5c96402ad065576f5e8d9ce32fb2f6a66ef: You're hunting for me at the moment. This rumour was about a . You'll need to bring back some of its .
textByHash.f81d52e3b6abed5ba9409a82588f2117260bac36: Excellent! Thanks for getting that done. Here's your reward.
